info.title: Mister.Version CLI Tool
info.description: Command-line tool for reporting and calculating versions in a monorepo with enhanced dev and feature branch support

commands.name: changelog
commands.description: Generate a changelog from commit history

options.name: --repo
options.description: (Default: .) Path to the Git repository root

options.name: --project
options.description: Project name for monorepo scenarios

options.name: --from
options.description: Start version tag (defaults to previous tag)

options.name: --to
options.description: End version tag (defaults to HEAD)

options.name: --output
options.description: (Default: markdown) Output format: markdown, text, json

options.name: --output-file
options.description: Output file path (if not specified, outputs to console)

options.name: --tag-prefix
options.description: (Default: v) Prefix for version tags

options.name: --repo-url
options.description: Repository URL for generating links (e.g.,

options.name: --include-authors
options.description: (Default: false) Include commit authors in changelog

options.name: --include-commits
options.description: (Default: true) Include commit links

options.name: --include-issues
options.description: (Default: true) Include issue references

options.name: --include-prs
options.description: (Default: true) Include PR references

options.name: --group-breaking
options.description: (Default: true) Group breaking changes separately

options.name: --config-file
options.description:
Path to mr-version.yml configuration file (auto-detected
if not specified)

options.name: --debug
options.description: (Default: false) Enable debug output

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: report
commands.description: Generate a version report for projects in the repository

options.name: --repo
options.description: (Default: .) Path to the Git repository root

options.name: --project-dir
options.description: Path to the directory containing projects

options.name: --output
options.description:
(Default: text) Output format: text, json, csv, or
graph

options.name: --file
options.description:
Output file path (if not specified, outputs to
console)

options.name: --branch
options.description:
Branch to report versions for (defaults to current
branch)

options.name: --tag-prefix
options.description: (Default: v) Prefix for version tags

options.name: --include-commits
options.description:
(Default: true) Include commit information in the
report

options.name: --include-dependencies
options.description:
(Default: true) Include dependency information in
the report

options.name: --include-test-projects
options.description: (Default: false) Include test projects in the

options.name: --include-non-packable
options.description: (Default: false) Include non-packable projects in

options.name: --graph-format
options.description:
(Default: mermaid) Graph format when output is
'graph': mermaid, dot, or ascii

options.name: --show-versions
options.description: (Default: true) Show version numbers in graph nodes

options.name: --changed-only
options.description:
(Default: false) Show only projects with version
changes

options.name: --debug
options.description: (Default: false) Enable debug output

options.name: --config-file
options.description:
Path to mr-version.yml configuration file
(auto-detected if not specified)

options.name: --enable-file-cache
options.description:
(Default: false) Enable file-based caching of
version results in .mrversion folder

options.name: --file-cache-path
options.description:
Custom path for the file cache directory (defaults
to .mrversion in repo root)

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
